pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: provides gentle illustration to support understanding without imposing interpretation
pillars.linguistic-minimalism: marks illustrative examples with minimal morphological machinery

description: Discourse marker introducing concrete examples or specific illustrations of abstract concepts. The breathy initial /ɸ/ suggests gentle offering rather than forceful demonstration.
grammatical_notes: As a discourse marker, appears sentence-initially to introduce specific examples or concrete illustrations. When sentence-initial, follows Slot 0 particles but precedes the subject. Transitions from abstract or general statements to concrete instances.
